en: I am speaking the truth in Christ- I am not lying; my conscience bears me witness in the Holy Spirit-
zh: 我在基督裡說的是實話，並沒有撒謊，因為我的良心在聖靈裡一同為我作證；

en: that I have great sorrow and unceasing anguish in my heart.
zh: 我大大憂愁，心裡常常傷痛。

en: For I could wish that I myself were accursed and cut off from Christ for the sake of my brothers, my kinsmen according to the flesh.
zh: 為我的同胞，就是我骨肉之親，就算自己受咒詛，與基督隔絕，我也甘心。

en: They are Israelites, and to them belong the adoption, the glory, the covenants, the giving of the law, the worship, and the promises.
zh: 他們是以色列人：嗣子的名分、榮耀、眾約、律法、敬拜的禮儀和各樣的應許，都是他們的。

en: To them belong the patriarchs, and from their race, according to the flesh, is the Christ who is God over all, blessed forever. Amen.
zh: 蒙揀選的列祖也是他們的祖宗；按肉身來說，基督也是出自他們這一族。其實，他是在萬有之上，永遠受稱頌的 神。阿們。

en: But it is not as though the word of God has failed. For not all who are descended from Israel belong to Israel,
zh: 當然，這不是說 神的話落了空，因為出自以色列的，不都是以色列人；

en: and not all are children of Abraham because they are his offspring, but "Through Isaac shall your offspring be named."
zh: 也不因為他們是亞伯拉罕的後裔，就都成為他的兒女，只有“以撒生的，才可以稱為你的後裔”，

en: This means that it is not the children of the flesh who are the children of God, but the children of the promise are counted as offspring.
zh: 這就是說，肉身生的兒女並不是 神的兒女，只有憑著應許生的兒女才算是後裔。

en: For this is what the promise said: "About this time next year I will return and Sarah shall have a son."
zh: 因為所應許的話是這樣：“明年這個時候我要來，撒拉必定生一個兒子。”

en: And not only so, but also when Rebecca had conceived children by one man, our forefather Isaac,
zh: 不但如此，利百加也是這樣：既然從一個人，就是從我們的祖宗以撒懷了孕，

en: though they were not yet born and had done nothing either good or bad- in order that God's purpose of election might continue, not because of works but because of his call-
zh: 雙生子還沒有生下來，善惡也沒有行出來 ，

en: she was told, "The older will serve the younger."
zh: 神就對她說：“將來大的要服事小的。”

en: As it is written, "Jacob I loved, but Esau I hated."
zh: 正如經上所記的： “我愛雅各， 卻惡以掃。”

en: What shall we say then? Is there injustice on God's part? By no means!
zh: 既是這樣，我們可以說甚麼呢？ 神不公平嗎？絕對不會！

en: For he says to Moses, "I will have mercy on whom I have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I have compassion."
zh: 因為他對摩西說： “我要憐憫誰，就憐憫誰； 我要恩待誰，就恩待誰。”

en: So then it depends not on human will or exertion, but on God, who has mercy.
zh: 這樣看來，既不是出於人意，也不是由於人為 ，只在於那憐憫人的 神。

en: For the Scripture says to Pharaoh, "For this very purpose I have raised you up, that I might show my power in you, and that my name might be proclaimed in all the earth."
zh: 經上有話對法老說：“我把你興起來，是要藉著你顯出我的大能，並且使我的名傳遍全地。”

en: So then he has mercy on whomever he wills, and he hardens whomever he wills.
zh: 這樣看來，他願意憐憫誰就憐憫誰，願意誰剛硬就使誰剛硬。

en: You will say to me then, "Why does he still find fault? For who can resist his will?"
zh: 這樣，你會對我說：“那麼他為甚麼責怪人呢？有誰抗拒他的旨意呢？”

en: But who are you, O man, to answer back to God? Will what is molded say to its molder, "Why have you made me like this?"
zh: 你這個人哪，你是誰，竟敢跟 神頂嘴呢？被造的怎麼可以對造他的說：“你為甚麼把我做成這個樣子呢？”

en: Has the potter no right over the clay, to make out of the same lump one vessel for honored use and another for dishonorable use?
zh: 陶匠難道沒有權用同一團的泥，又做貴重的、又做卑賤的器皿嗎？

en: What if God, desiring to show his wrath and to make known his power, has endured with much patience vessels of wrath prepared for destruction,
zh: 如果 神有意要顯明他的忿怒，彰顯他的大能，而多多容忍那可怒、預備遭毀滅的器皿，

en: in order to make known the riches of his glory for vessels of mercy, which he has prepared beforehand for glory-
zh: 為了要使他豐盛的榮耀，彰顯在那蒙恩、早已預備要得榮耀的器皿上，這又有甚麼不可呢？

en: even us whom he has called, not from the Jews only but also from the Gentiles?
zh: 這器皿就是我們這些不但從猶太人中，也從外族人中蒙召的人。

en: As indeed he says in Hosea, "Those who were not my people I will call 'my people,' and her who was not beloved I will call 'beloved.'"
zh: 就如 神在何西阿書上說的： “我要稱那不是我子民的為我的子民， 那不蒙愛的為蒙愛的；

en: "And in the very place where it was said to them, 'You are not my people,' there they will be called 'sons of the living God.'"
zh: 從前在甚麼地方對他們說： 你們不是我的子民， 將來就在那裡稱他們為永活 神的兒子。”

en: And Isaiah cries out concerning Israel: "Though the number of the sons of Israel be as the sand of the sea, only a remnant of them will be saved,
zh: 以賽亞指著以色列人大聲說：“以色列子孫的數目雖然多如海沙，得救的不過是剩下的餘數；

en: for the Lord will carry out his sentence upon the earth fully and without delay."
zh: 因為主必在地上迅速而徹底地成就他的話。”

en: And as Isaiah predicted, "If the Lord of hosts had not left us offspring, we would have been like Sodom and become like Gomorrah."
zh: 又如以賽亞早已說過的： “如果不是萬軍之主給我們存留後裔， 我們早就像所多瑪 和蛾摩拉一樣了。”

en: What shall we say, then? That Gentiles who did not pursue righteousness have attained it, that is, a righteousness that is by faith;
zh: 既是這樣，我們還有甚麼可說的呢？那不追求義的外族人卻得了義，就是因信而得的義。

en: but that Israel who pursued a law that would lead to righteousness did not succeed in reaching that law.
zh: 但以色列人追求律法的義 ，卻達不到律法的要求。

en: Why? Because they did not pursue it by faith, but as if it were based on works. They have stumbled over the stumbling stone,
zh: 這是甚麼緣故呢？因為他們不憑信心，只靠行為。他們絆倒在那絆腳石上，

en: as it is written, "Behold, I am laying in Zion a stone of stumbling, and a rock of offense; and whoever believes in him will not be put to shame."
zh: 正如經上所記： “看哪，我在錫安放了一塊絆腳石， 是絆倒人的磐石； 信靠他的人， 必不致失望。”
